Stolen from r/ThatsNotHowWomenWork via BoredPanda
An oldie but a goodie.
This one makes me so angry. So f'ing mad.
Shocking how many of these are "I don't think women are people."

item.title: heelo imager. I am grate artiste.
item.dc:creator: GrateArtiste

item.title: MAKE SWORDS GREAT AGAIN ⚔️ Join me in my fight for sword holding normalization!!!
item.description: can't a girl just like to pose with a sword nowadays damn ⚔️ I am not being really serious in this video by the way, I thought it was really funny that holding swords would polarize opinions so much hahaha OH but I was beung serious about putting a sword in as many character's hands as I can even if it isn't canon Edit : Yes the video is slightly sped up. Why? Well, I posted it at normal speed on other platforms (you can watch it at NORMAL SPEED HERE : https://www.instagram.com/reel/C51n727Sot1/ ) but Imgur limit is only 60seconds per video only and I tried my best to reduce the length but I HAD TOO MUCH TO SAY ? about swords I guess that I couldn't see which part I could cut further, so I increased speed to have the video go from 90 seconds to 60 seconds. Mystery solved hehe!!
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Mostly trans memes for your enjoyment! :)

Look how happy she is! :)
I need these pearls! Credit: @crimsonrune.bsky.social
Credit: PrincessHinghoi
Credit: samlizzy71
She's so pretty!
:3
Girls :3
Credit: veguinsky - absolutely love their art
Credit: thelilnan
Nothing to see here, just a completely cis activity!
Credit: Color_LES / Mage & Demon Queen
Credit: rudysaki
Credit: alienby
Credit: alienby
Yup, actually that's super accurate, and the game is partially responsible, too! :)
Sometimes at the same time!
Credit: @iancsamson.bsky.social

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Tuesday meme dump
item.description:
1. Now everybody sing it with him
2. When you're a dad but ball is life
3
4. Task failed successfully
5. Or an Influencer....
6. Big cat can't get enough of this swing
7
8. Man, I'm tired of idiots
9. Tired of idiots: the sequel
10. I mean he is not wrong about the last part. Star Wars has been a creativly bankrupt disaster.
11. Meh, I would still turn left
12. True
13. Australian police vs drunk person
14. It should be illegal to be this cute
15. And finally I would like to share something from myself. I've been working very hard on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal. The demo is out now and it made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! And it features witty signs like this one here. "What?", I hear you ask. "I can read funny signs for free?" YES, yes you can! Try it now on Steam and please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you, and if this dump made you smile at least once, I am happy with it! : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: My Thirtyfourth Dump
item.description:
Today's bait image is not a pretty lady, and not exactly a pretty car, but I hope it upsets and infuriates you all the same.
Guys.
It happened.
Today we have reached the end of the journey.
There are no more images left in the imgur download folder on my phone.
What a ride it's been.
So now there will no longer be daily dumps. You will have to look to the east, on the dawn of the fifth day (starting 5 days before I have another 50 images collected), for my return.
You know, back in one of my very early dumps, I said that I wasn't sure I could trust you guys to travel on this Lean Mean Meme Teme Macheme with me. But you know what? Some of you are all right, I think.
So anyway. LET'S GOOOOOO!!!
This incredible gif was actually left as a comment on one of my earlier dumps, and it is magnificent.
I am sorry I am sorry I am sorry I am sorry I am sorry.
We are not going out without frogs, guys.
Never thought I would miss Eerie Red Eyes.
I wonder if this dump will get auto-marked as mature as well. 'Twould be fitting.
KANE LIVES!!
This too is from the comments of one of my earlier dumps that had a piece of Mordin appreciation art in it.
I really enjoyed reading all the comments and engagements!
Getting addicted to that little arrow pop-up on my phone's lock screen when y'all leave comments'n'shit.
Frog!
Frog! <3
Oh look, it me.
Helldivers 2 meme! I am learning to enjoy that game. Slowly.
The Meme Teme Macheme coming to a halt is signified by these last images being from yesterday's front page.
item.dc:creator: Kateness

item.title: Salma Hayek Says Her Family Won't Let Her Take Swimsuit Photos in 'Peace'
item.description:
(I did not make this video).
Salma Hayek can't get a moment of peace as she tries to take some bikini photos. On Monday, April 15, the actress, 57, shared several photos to Instagram of her attempts to pose in her swimsuit as she gets out of a pool — only to be foiled by her family spraying water from a hose in her face as she climbs up the ladder. "When your family won’t let you take a bikini ріс in peace."
And a throwback ...
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Images of Note: it's got anxiety
item.description:
We need a sign sign sign
Elmo has seen the face of God and it was weeping.
it's them!
RIP LeBron James, we'll forgive you for Space Jam II
Nya
The fish will know the name Dale Gribble.
It's because a lot of very rich people have investments in office space.
Fairy Frog Hospital.
To be fair, Slackware is the longest running still maintained Linux Distro.
Truly a Joker move.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii where we talk about some deep shit.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also we're streaming: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
